options.B: Protein structure prediction outperforms inverse protein folding in terms of sequence recovery rate.

options.C: BioFinder has shown notable performance enhancement in the subdomain of microbial genome analysis.
options.D: BioFinder has shown notable performance enhancement in the subdomain of medical imaging interpretation.
